sentences.english: Do you prefer reading paper books or listening to audiobooks?
sentences.korean: 종이 책 읽기와 오디오북 듣기 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I prefer audiobooks because they let me consume books during times when reading would be impossible.
sentences.korean: 독서가 불가능한 시간에 책을 소비할 수 있기 때문에 오디오북을 선호해요.

sentences.english: I listen while commuting exercising and doing household chores which means I finish about three books a month compared to one with paper books.
sentences.korean: 통근 운동 집안일 하면서 듣는데 종이 책으로 한 달에 한 권인 것에 비해 약 세 권을 끝내요.

sentences.english: Also a great narrator can bring characters to life in ways that reading silently simply cannot.
sentences.korean: 또한 훌륭한 내레이터는 조용히 읽는 것으로는 불가능한 방식으로 캐릭터에 생명을 불어넣을 수 있어요.

sentences.english: The one downside is that I sometimes zone out during complex sections and have to rewind which doesn't happen with paper books.
sentences.korean: 유일한 단점은 복잡한 부분에서 가끔 멍해져서 되감아야 한다는 거예요. 종이 책에서는 일어나지 않아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Book That Changed Your Thinking
